properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.training-run
properties.description: Whether this is a training run. Set via TRAINING_RUN_JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS=-Dautoconfiguration.optimizer.training-run=true during build.

properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.enabled
properties.description: Whether the autoconfiguration optimizer is enabled. When true and a training file is present, only listed auto-configurations are loaded.

properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.output-file
properties.description: The name of the output file for training run results.

properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.output-directory
properties.description: The output directory for the training run results file.

properties.name: autoconfiguration.optimizer.exit-after-training
properties.description: Whether to exit the application after a training run completes.
